The talk of municipal paving
plant for repair work on the as
phalt STREETS is increasing. City En-

The Washington Water Power
Co. has entered an emphatic denial
that it has taken any power sites
on the Pend d'Oreille river, as
charged in a dispatch from New
port, Wash. 1t says that it is
neither directly nor indirectly in
terested in any water power site on
this stream.


Three marriages were performed
in the courthouse Yesterday, two by
Justice Stocker and one by Judge
Hinkle.


The post card craze seems not to
abate. and the sale OF post cards
has been greater this Christmas
than ever before. One Spokane
wholesale house is said to have sold
over 100000 post cards since De
cember l.
